20:11 â April 29, 2020
Electronic Bill Payment System Part Update
Central 1 is offering a biller transaction limit service that allows financial institutions to set a transaction limit on a certain number of billers of your choice. This service is only available to Central 1âs real time clients. It is not compatible for financial institutions that use batch integration, since the biller transaction limit is only verified for electronic bill payments made online, by telephone banking, at an ATM, or in-branch.
We updated the Electronic Bill Payments System Part in the Payment Solutions Manual as described in the table below.
